title: Sticky Sessions & Socket Pub/Sub
description: Architect sticky session implementations for WebSocket connections in clustered environments. Implement pub/sub patterns for state synchronization across multiple server nodes. Evaluate the use of backplanes like Redis or NATS for real-time data distribution.
objectives: Architect sticky session implementations for WebSocket connections in clustered environments.
Implement pub/sub patterns for state synchronization across multiple server nodes.
Evaluate the use of backplanes like Redis or NATS for real-time data distribution.
